summary.shape_sentence: Sharp post-open rebound and squeeze into midday, then rotational fade that broke lower late and finished near the session low.

goat.note: Best RTH expansion was the opening recovery leg that carried from the post-open low area into the midday high near 25,145.

red_circles.behavior: Appeared near lower highs and failed squeezes, especially around the midday crest and later afternoon rollover points.

green_circles.behavior: Marked early support and reclaim points after the open, but later bullish pivots had weaker follow-through.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply clustered around 25,080-25,150 and above; these zones repeatedly capped upside and were respected during RTH.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand first held near 24,900-24,940, then lower support formed near 24,840-24,880; upper demand broke later while lower demand produced the final bounce.

time_markers.10am_blue: Rebound phase was active, with price climbing away from the opening low structure and regaining ground.
time_markers.12pm_red: Market was testing or just backing off from the session high area; upside momentum was beginning to stall.
time_markers.2pm_green: Afternoon trade was rotational and weaker, holding below the noon high and preparing for the later downside break.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Close came after a late selloff into fresh RTH lows, with only a modest rebound into the bell.

takeaway: Bearish reversal/distribution day with a strong opening recovery into midday supply, followed by failed continuation and a late-session breakdown.
